products.name: Patharchatta
products.title: Patharchatta – Kidney Stone Remedy Herb
products.description: Fleshy, succulent leaves used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat kidney stones, urinary disorders, and skin conditions.

products.name: Gotu Kola
products.title: Gotu Kola – Brain-Boosting Longevity Herb
products.description: Used in Ayurveda and Traditional Chinese Medicine to improve brain function, wound healing, and reduce anxiety.

products.name: Sage
products.title: Sage – Antibacterial Culinary Healing Sage
products.description: Soft, velvety aromatic leaves with powerful antibacterial properties. Used in cooking, throat remedies, and smudging rituals.

products.name: Lemon Balm
products.title: Lemon Balm – Calming Citrus-Scented Herb
products.description: Lemon-scented leaves used to reduce anxiety, improve sleep, ease digestive issues, and make calming herbal tea.

products.name: Mango
products.title: Mango – King of Tropical Fruits
products.description: India's national fruit with sweet, golden flesh. Grafted dwarf varieties fruit within 2–3 years. Excellent for gardens.

products.name: Guava
products.title: Guava – Vitamin C Powerhouse Tropical Fruit
products.description: Highly nutritious fruit rich in Vitamin C and antioxidants. Fast-bearing and adaptable to pot growing.

products.name: Lemon
products.title: Lemon – Tangy Evergreen Citrus Tree
products.description: Abundant, juicy lemons on an attractive evergreen tree. Bears fruit almost year-round in tropical climates.

products.name: Orange
products.title: Orange – Sweet Citrus Balcony Tree
products.description: Sweet, juicy oranges on a manageable, attractive tree. Can be grown in large containers on balconies and patios.

products.name: Sweet Lime
products.title: Sweet Lime – Low-Acid Refreshing Citrus
products.description: Less acidic than regular lime with a pleasant sweet taste. Easy to grow in tropical climates and containers.

products.name: Pomegranate
products.title: Pomegranate – Antioxidant-Rich Ruby Fruit
products.description: Ruby-red, jewel-like arils packed with antioxidants. Drought-tolerant once established and very ornamental when in flower.
products.watering: Low to Medium – Water twice a week

products.name: Sapota (Chikoo)
products.title: Sapota – Caramel-Sweet Brown Tropical Fruit
products.description: Russet-brown fruit with soft, sweet, caramel-flavored flesh. A beloved tropical fruit tree for home gardens.

products.name: Custard Apple
products.title: Custard Apple – Creamy Sweet Tropical Delight
products.description: Heart-shaped fruit with creamy, custardy sweet white flesh. A delicious, ornamental tropical fruit tree.

products.name: Dragon Fruit
products.title: Dragon Fruit – Exotic Night-Blooming Cactus Fruit
products.description: Spectacular pink-skinned fruit with white or red flesh and tiny black seeds. Grown on a climbing cactus.

products.name: Papaya
products.title: Papaya – Fast-Growing Tropical Vitamin Fruit
products.description: Bears large, orange-fleshed fruits within a year of planting. Rich in vitamins A and C and digestive enzymes.

products.name: Banana
products.title: Banana – Fast-Fruiting Tropical Garden Giant
products.description: Produces hands of sweet, energy-rich bananas within 9–12 months. Large, architectural leaves make a tropical statement.

products.name: Strawberry
products.title: Strawberry – Sweet Container Berry Favorite
products.description: Bright red, sweet berries that grow beautifully in pots, grow bags, or raised beds. Great for balconies and terraces.

products.name: Blueberry
products.title: Blueberry – Antioxidant Superfood Berry
products.description: Plump, sweet-tart berries packed with antioxidants. Requires acidic soil but grows well in containers.

products.name: Fig
products.title: Fig – Ancient Sweet Honeyed Fruit Tree
products.description: Sweet, honey-like fruits on an ornamental tree with large, lobed leaves. Excellent for pots and warm gardens.

products.name: Avocado
products.title: Avocado – Creamy Nutritious Superfood Fruit
products.description: Buttery, creamy green fruit packed with healthy fats. Grows as an attractive tree in warm, frost-free climates.

products.name: Pineapple
products.title: Pineapple – Tropical Crown Jewel Container Fruit
products.description: Sweet, tangy tropical fruit that grows from a central crown. Can be grown from the top of a shop-bought pineapple.

products.name: Jamun
products.title: Jamun – Blood Sugar Regulating Indian Berry
products.description: Dark purple berries with a sweet-astringent taste. Used in Ayurveda to manage diabetes. A beloved Indian summer fruit.

products.name: Mulberry
products.title: Mulberry – Fast-Fruiting Sweet Garden Berry
products.description: Long, sweet berries in red, white, or black. Fast-growing and productive with very little care required.

products.name: Star Fruit
products.title: Star Fruit – Star-Shaped Tropical Novelty Fruit
products.description: Waxy, yellow fruit with a distinctive star cross-section and sweet-tart flavor. A beautiful ornamental fruit tree.

products.name: Passion Fruit
products.title: Passion Fruit – Tropical Climbing Exotic Fruit
products.description: Purple or yellow fruits with intensely flavored, seedy pulp. A vigorous climbing vine with spectacular flowers.

products.name: Amla
products.title: Amla – Vitamin C Superfruit Ayurvedic Berry
products.description: Indian gooseberry with exceptionally high Vitamin C content. A cornerstone of Ayurvedic medicine and hair care.

products.name: Litchi
products.title: Litchi – Fragrant Jewel-Skinned Tropical Fruit
products.description: Red, rough-skinned fruits with incredibly fragrant, juicy, sweet white flesh. A prized tropical luxury fruit.

products.name: Peach
products.title: Peach – Velvety Summer Stone Fruit
products.description: Velvet-skinned fruits with sweet, fragrant, juicy flesh. Low-chill varieties can be grown in tropical and subtropical gardens.

products.name: Pear
products.title: Pear – Crisp Autumn Garden Orchard Fruit
products.description: Crisp, sweet, or mildly gritty fruits on an attractive, upright tree. Low-chill varieties suitable for warm climates.

products.name: Apple (Low Chill)
products.title: Low Chill Apple – Tropical Climate Orchard Fruit
products.description: Special low-chill varieties of apple bred specifically for warm, tropical climates. Bears crisp, sweet fruits.

products.name: Grapes
products.title: Grapes – Classic Climbing Vineyard Fruit
products.description: Sweet or wine grapes grow on vigorous vines. Can be trained on pergolas, fences, or trellises in warm climates.

products.name: Raspberry
products.title: Raspberry – Tangy Cane Berry Garden Treat
products.description: Delicate, sweet-tart red or yellow berries on thorny canes. Best in cooler climates or hills. Very rewarding to grow.

products.name: Blackberry
products.title: Blackberry – Wild Glossy Bramble Berry
products.description: Plump, deep glossy-black berries with intense sweet-tart flavor. Vigorous canes that work well trained on a trellis.

products.name: Water Apple
products.title: Water Apple – Crunchy Bell-Shaped Tropical Fruit
products.description: Crisp, watery, mildly sweet bell-shaped fruits in rose-pink or red. A refreshing tropical fruit perfect for home gardens.

products.name: Tamarind
products.title: Tamarind – Tangy Ancient Tropical Pod Tree
products.description: Pod-bearing tree with intensely tangy, sweet-sour pulp used in cooking, drinks, and Ayurvedic medicine.
products.watering: Low – Water twice a week once established

products.name: Echeveria
products.title: Echeveria – Rosette Succulent Rainbow Collection
products.description: Compact, jewel-like rosettes in a full spectrum of colors including blue, pink, purple, and green. Extremely easy to grow.

products.name: Haworthia
products.title: Haworthia – Miniature Zebra-Striped Window Plant
products.description: Compact rosettes with distinctive white horizontal banding. Unique translucent leaf tips allow light inside the leaf.

products.name: Jade Plant
products.title: Jade Plant – Woody Coin-Leaf Fortune Plant
products.description: Classic feng shui plant with thick, round, coin-shaped leaves on branching woody stems. Symbolizes wealth and luck.

products.name: Sedum
products.title: Sedum – Versatile Groundcover Stonecrop
products.description: Dense mats of small, water-storing leaves in green, blue, red, or yellow. Excellent groundcover or container plant.

products.name: Kalanchoe
products.title: Kalanchoe – Long-Blooming Cheerful Succulent
products.description: Clusters of small flowers in red, orange, yellow, and pink above thick, waxy leaves. Reblooms easily with darkness treatment.

products.name: Crassula Ovata
products.title: Crassula Ovata – Classic Jade Money Tree
products.description: The original jade plant with plump, oval, glossy leaves. Develops into a beautiful miniature tree form over time.

products.name: Burro's Tail
products.title: Burro's Tail – Woven Bead Trailing Succulent
products.description: Spectacular long stems densely woven with plump, blue-green, teardrop-shaped leaves. Stunning in tall hanging pots.

products.name: Ghost Plant
products.title: Ghost Plant – Silvery Blue Rosette Succulent
products.description: Powdery, pale silvery-blue rosettes that blush pink in full sun. Very drought-tolerant and propagates easily.

products.name: Gasteria
products.title: Gasteria – Tongue-Shaped Shade Tolerant Succulent
products.description: Thick, tongue-shaped, dark green leaves with white spotting. One of the few succulents that tolerates low light well.

products.name: Agave
products.title: Agave – Architectural Desert Century Plant
products.description: Bold, architectural rosette of thick, spiny leaves. Extremely drought and heat tolerant. Makes a dramatic statement plant.

products.name: Aloe Aristata
products.title: Aloe Aristata – Lace Aloe Compact Rosette
products.description: Compact, dark green rosettes with white-fringed leaf margins. More tolerant of low light than most aloes.

products.name: Lithops (Living Stones)
products.title: Lithops – Pebble-Mimicking Living Stone Plant
products.description: Remarkable plants that mimic stones to avoid being eaten. Two plump lobes split annually to reveal a new plant.

products.name: Golden Barrel Cactus
products.title: Golden Barrel Cactus – Spiny Globe Desert Classic
products.description: A large, perfectly round golden-spined barrel cactus. Slow-growing and dramatic; a classic desert garden centerpiece.

products.name: Bunny Ear Cactus
products.title: Bunny Ear Cactus – Playful Polka-Dot Pad Cactus
products.description: Flat, oval pads arranged like bunny ears covered in golden glochids. A fun and popular beginner cactus.

products.name: Mammillaria
products.title: Mammillaria – Crown-of-Flowers Globe Cactus
products.description: Small, globe-shaped cacti covered in neat spirals of white spines. Forms a halo of tiny pink or white flowers.

products.name: Hedgehog Cactus
products.title: Hedgehog Cactus – Cluster-Forming Desert Bloomer
products.description: Cylindrical clusters of ribbed cactus bodies covered in spines. Produces large, showy flowers in red or pink.

products.name: Moon Cactus
products.title: Moon Cactus – Neon-Colored Grafted Novelty Cactus
products.description: Vivid neon red, orange, or yellow mutant cactus grafted onto a green rootstock. A popular and eye-catching novelty plant.

products.name: Fishhook Cactus
products.title: Fishhook Cactus – Hooked-Spine Desert Survivor
products.description: Named for its distinctive hooked central spine. Compact and adapted to extreme drought and desert conditions.

products.name: Parodia Cactus
products.title: Parodia Cactus – Ribbed Golden Spine Ball Cactus
products.description: Attractive, ribbed spherical cactus with golden spines and bright yellow flowers. Very popular and easy to grow.

products.name: Echinopsis Cactus
products.title: Echinopsis Cactus – Night-Blooming Giant Flower Cactus
products.description: Columnar or globe-shaped cactus that produces spectacular, enormous flowers, often at night. A dramatic bloomer.

products.name: Ferocactus
products.title: Ferocactus – Bold Hooked Spine Barrel Cactus
products.description: Large barrel cactus with fierce, hooked red or yellow spines. A dramatic, architectural desert statement plant.

products.name: Opuntia
products.title: Opuntia – Flat Pad Prickly Pear Cactus
products.description: Flat, paddle-shaped pads that produce edible prickly pear fruits. Very drought-hardy and makes an effective security hedge.

products.name: Cereus
products.title: Cereus – Tall Columnar Night-Blooming Pillar
products.description: Tall, blue-green columnar cactus that produces large, fragrant white flowers at night. A striking architectural plant.

products.name: Gymnocalycium
products.title: Gymnocalycium – Chin Cactus Easy Indoor Bloomer
products.description: Small, globe-shaped cactus with distinctive 'chinned' tubercles. Tolerates lower light than most cacti and blooms freely.

products.name: Rebutia
products.title: Rebutia – Crown-Blooming Miniature Mountain Cactus
products.description: Tiny, clustering globe cacti that produce a profusion of brilliant flowers from the base. Easy and rewarding to grow.

products.name: Astrophytum
products.title: Astrophytum – Star-Shaped Bishop's Cap Cactus
products.description: Star-shaped in cross-section with distinctive white flecks and fluffy areoles. Produces large, silky yellow flowers.

products.name: Notocactus
products.title: Notocactus – Golden-Spined Compact Bloomer
products.description: Compact, golden-spined spherical cactus with glossy, bright yellow flowers. A reliable and rewarding bloomer.

products.name: Neem Tree
products.title: Neem Tree – Sacred Medicinal Guardian Tree
products.description: India's pharmacy tree with powerful antimicrobial and pesticidal properties. Every part has medicinal uses.

products.name: Ashoka Tree
products.title: Ashoka Tree – Sacred Elegant Flowering Tree
products.description: Tall, conical tree with dense, drooping foliage and fragrant orange-red flower clusters. A sacred and ornamental tree.

products.name: Gulmohar
products.title: Gulmohar – Flamboyant Fiery Canopy Tree
products.description: Spectacular umbrella-shaped canopy of bright scarlet-orange flowers. One of the most beautiful flowering trees in the world.

products.name: Cassia Fistula (Amaltas)
products.title: Amaltas – Golden Shower Waterfall Tree
products.description: Cascading chains of brilliant yellow flowers drape the entire tree. India's most spectacular flowering tree.

products.name: Silver Oak
products.title: Silver Oak – Elegant Feathery Shade Tree
products.description: Tall, elegant tree with deeply cut, fern-like silver-green foliage. Beautiful orange honeycomb flowers attract sunbirds.

products.name: Bottlebrush Tree
products.title: Bottlebrush Tree – Red Cylindrical Flower Spike Tree
products.description: Striking cylindrical, bright red flower spikes resembling a bottle brush. Attracts sunbirds and butterflies.

products.name: Tabebuia
products.title: Tabebuia – Spring Trumpet-Flower Spectacle Tree
products.description: Bare branches burst into a cloud of pink, yellow, or white trumpet flowers in spring. A truly breathtaking sight.

products.name: Jacaranda
products.title: Jacaranda – Purple Blossom Dream Tree
products.description: Covered in a haze of lavender-purple trumpet flowers in spring. One of the world's most beautiful ornamental trees.

products.name: Plumeria (Frangipani)
products.title: Frangipani – Iconic Tropical Fragrance Tree
products.description: Waxy, fragrant flowers in white, pink, yellow, or red. The quintessential tropical garden tree used in garlands.

products.name: Kadamba Tree
products.title: Kadamba – Sacred Fragrant Round-Flower Tree
products.description: Sacred tree associated with Lord Krishna bearing unique spherical orange flowers with an intense fragrance.

products.name: Arjuna Tree
products.title: Arjuna Tree – Sacred Cardiac Healing Tree
products.description: Revered in Ayurveda for its powerful heart-healing properties. A large, majestic tree often found near rivers.

products.name: Indian Cork Tree
products.title: Indian Cork Tree – Fragrant White Night Bloomer
products.description: Bears clusters of fragrant, white funnel-shaped flowers that are especially fragrant at night. A beautiful avenue tree.

products.name: Champa
products.title: Champa – Intensely Fragrant Temple Flower Tree
products.description: Yellow and white flowers with an intense, intoxicating fragrance. Sacred and widely used in temples and ceremonies.

products.name: Banyan Bonsai
products.title: Banyan Bonsai – Ancient Aerial Root Miniature
products.description: The national tree of India in miniature bonsai form. Develops dramatic aerial roots and a gnarled, ancient appearance.

products.name: Peepal Bonsai
products.title: Peepal Bonsai – Sacred Fig Miniature Tree
products.description: The sacred Bodhi tree in bonsai form. Beautiful, heart-shaped leaves with a distinctive drip tip on an artistic miniature.
